rows.answer: Full-time employees at Acme Corp accrue 22 days of paid annual leave per calendar year [1]. At EvalCorp, full-time employees accrue 24 days per year [2].

At EvalCorp, full-time employees may carry over up to 6 unused annual leave days into the next year, and those carried days expire on April 30 [1]. At Acme Corp, the carry-over limit is 5 days, and any excess is forfeited on March 31 [2].

For EvalCorp, leave requests longer than 4 consecutive days require 15 business days of advance notice through the HR portal [1]. For Acme Corp, leave requests longer than 3 consecutive days require 10 business days of advance notice through the HR portal [4].
You need a doctor's note for sick leave if your absence is 3 or more consecutive days, and the note must be submitted within 48 hours of returning to work [1][4].
Primary caregivers receive 16 weeks of fully paid parental leave [1].
Yes, parental leave may be split into at most 2 blocks within the first 12 months after birth or adoption [1].
You receive 3 days of paid marriage leave [1][3].

The conditions for requesting unpaid leave depend on the policy in effect. Under the current leave policy, after 2 years of tenure, employees may request up to 3 months of unpaid leave once every 5 years, subject to VP approval and a 60-day notice period [1]. Under the 2023 rules, unpaid leave was capped at 1 month after 3 years of tenure [2].

At EvalCorp, you may work remotely up to 2 days per week, with Tuesdays and Thursdays being mandatory office days for all teams [1]. Fully remote arrangements require director approval and are re-evaluated every quarter [1].
Everyone must be in the office on Tuesdays and Thursdays [1].

The core hours for remote employees depend on which company's policy applies.

At EvalCorp, remote employees must be online and reachable during core hours of 09:30–15:30 Istanbul time (UTC+3) [1].

At Acme Corp, remote employees must be reachable during core hours of 10:00–16:00 in the Istanbul (UTC+3) time zone [2].
The one-time home office stipend is 9000 TRY, and the monthly internet allowance is 400 TRY [2][3].
You are allowed to work from outside Turkey for at most 30 calendar days per year [1].

It depends on the coffee shop's policy and your employer's rules. Most coffee shops allow customers to use their Wi-Fi, but they may have time limits or require a purchase. Check with your employer first — some companies prohibit using public Wi-Fi for security reasons, or require a VPN.

At Acme Corp, fully remote arrangements require VP-level approval and are reviewed every 6 months [1]. At EvalCorp, fully remote arrangements require director approval and are re-evaluated every quarter [2].
International business trips must be booked at least 14 days in advance [1].

The domestic per-diem rate depends on which company's policy applies.

For EvalCorp, the current domestic per-diem is 1800 TRY per day [1]. The archived 2023 policy had a rate of 950 TRY per day, but that version is superseded [2].

For Acme Corp, the domestic per-diem is $60 per day [3].

The per-diem for business travel in Europe is 90 EUR per day [1]. This rate applies to international travel in Europe and covers meals and incidentals, with no receipts required for per-diem claims [1].

You can fly premium economy when the airline offers it on your route and it's available for purchase. It's typically available on long-haul international flights, and you can book it directly or request an upgrade at check-in or the gate, depending on availability.

The mileage reimbursement rate for using your own car depends on which policy applies.

Under the current company policy, mileage is reimbursed at $0.45 per kilometer for personal vehicle use on approved business trips [1][4].

However, if you are traveling in Turkey, the travel expenses policy states mileage is reimbursed at 14 TRY per kilometer [2].

The 2023 archived policy, which is superseded, had a rate of 8 TRY per kilometer [3].
The nightly hotel cap for domestic travel is 7500 TRY per night [1].

If you lose a receipt for an expense above 3000 TRY, the item will not be reimbursed [1]. For expenses below that threshold, the policy does not specify a consequence for missing receipts, but all expense reports require itemized receipts attached [1].

The deadline depends on which company's policy applies.

For EvalCorp, expense reports are due within 21 days of trip completion [1].

For Acme Corp, business expenses must be submitted within 30 days of being incurred [3].

Under the 2023 travel policy (which may no longer be current), reports were due within 45 days of trip completion [2].
EvalCorp requires passwords to be at least 16 characters long, with rotation every 12 months [1]. Globex Corp requires passwords to be at least 14 characters long, with rotation every 180 days [2].

Suspected security incidents must be reported to the SOC within 30 minutes of discovery via the #sec-incident channel or the 24/7 hotline [1]. Employees must not attempt to investigate or remediate incidents themselves [1].

The deadline for reporting a lost laptop depends on which policy applies:

- Under the security policy, lost or stolen devices must be reported within 4 hours [1].
- Under the HR policy, lost or stolen devices must be reported within 24 hours [2].

If you are unsure which policy governs your situation, please check with your manager or the SOC.

Yes, you can usually check work email on your personal phone, but it depends on your employer's policy. Many companies allow it using a secure email app or by adding the account to your phone's mail app. However, you may need to agree to security rules, like setting a passcode or allowing remote wipe of company data. Check with your IT department first to ensure you follow their guidelines.
No, production data may never be copied to development environments; only approved anonymized datasets may be used instead [1][2].
Privileged admin access expires after 12 hours [1].
Access that has not been used for 90 days is revoked automatically [1].

The probation period for new hires depends on the company. At EvalCorp, new hires complete a 4-month probation period with a mid-point check-in at week 8, and it may be extended once by at most 2 months [1]. At ACME, new hires complete a 3-month probation period, extendable once by 3 months [2].
Performance reviews happen twice a year, in May and November [1]. Promotion decisions are made only in the November cycle [1].
Yes, private health insurance covers spouses and children at no extra cost [1].
The meal card is loaded with 350 TRY per working day [1].
The annual learning budget is 30,000 TRY per employee [1]. It does not roll over; any unused budget is forfeited [1].
The referral bonus is 40,000 TRY gross, paid after the referred employee completes probation [1]. For hard-to-fill roles listed by Talent Acquisition, the bonus is double that amount [1].
